theorem exercise_1_4
(α : Type*) [partial_order α]
(s : set α)
(x y : α)
(h₀ : set.nonempty s)
(h₁ : x ∈ lower_bounds s)
(h₂ : y ∈ upper_bounds s)
: x ≤ y := by 
  have h_main : x ≤ y := by
    obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := h₀
    have h₃ : x ≤ a := h₁ ha
    have h₄ : a ≤ y := h₂ ha
    exact le_trans h₃ h₄
  exact h_main

theorem exercise_2_19a {X : Type*} [metric_space X]
  (A B : set X) (hA : is_closed A) (hB : is_closed B) (hAB : disjoint A B) :
  separated_nhds A B := by 
  have h₁ : IsOpen (X \ B) := by
    apply isOpen_compl_iff.mpr
    exact hB
  
  have h₂ : A ⊆ (X \ B) := by
    intro x hx
    have h₃ : x ∉ B := by
      intro h₄
      have h₅ : x ∈ A ∩ B := Set.mem_inter hx h₄
      have h₆ : x ∈ A ∩ B := h₅
      exact hAB h₆
    exact h₃
  
  have h₃ : IsOpen (X \ A) := by
    apply isOpen_compl_iff.mpr
    exact hA
  
  have h₄ : B ⊆ (X \ A) := by
    intro x hx
    have h₅ : x ∉ A := by
      intro h₆
      have h₇ : x ∈ A ∩ B := Set.mem_inter h₆ hx
      have h₈ : x ∈ A ∩ B := h₇
      exact hAB h₈
    exact h₅
  
  have h₅ : Disjoint (X \ B) (X \ A) := by
    rw [Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
    have h₅₁ : (X \ B) ∩ (X \ A) = (A ∪ B)ᶜ := by
      ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_union]
      <;>
      by_cases h : x ∈ A <;>
      by_cases h' : x ∈ B <;>
      simp_all [Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
      <;>
      tauto
    rw [h₅₁]
    <;> simp [Set.ext_iff, Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
    <;>
    by_cases h : x ∈ A <;>
    by_cases h' : x ∈ B <;>
    simp_all [Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
    <;>
    tauto
  
  have h₆ : separated_nhds A B := by
    refine' ⟨X \ B, X \ A, h₁, h₃, _, _, _⟩
    · 
      exact nhdsWithin_le_nhds.mpr (by
        
        have h₆₁ : A ⊆ (X \ B) := h₂
        have h₆₂ : IsOpen (X \ B) := h₁
        have h₆₃ : A ∈ nhds (X \ B) := by
          
          exact isOpen_iff_nhds_open.mpr h₆₂ |>.mem_of_mem h₆₁
        
        simpa [nhdsWithin_le_nhds] using h₆₃)
    · 
      exact nhdsWithin_le_nhds.mpr (by
        
        have h₆₁ : B ⊆ (X \ A) := h₄
        have h₆₂ : IsOpen (X \ A) := h₃
        have h₆₃ : B ∈ nhds (X \ A) := by
          
          exact isOpen_iff_nhds_open.mpr h₆₂ |>.mem_of_mem h₆₁
        
        simpa [nhdsWithin_le_nhds] using h₆₃)
    · 
      exact h₅
  
  exact h₆

theorem exercise_1_17
  (n : ℕ)
  (x y : euclidean_space ℝ (fin n)) 
  : ‖x + y‖^2 + ‖x - y‖^2 = 2*‖x‖^2 + 2*‖y‖^2 := by 
  have h1 : ‖x + y‖^2 = ‖x‖^2 + ‖y‖^2 + 2 * ⟪x, y⟫ := by
    calc
      ‖x + y‖ ^ 2 = ‖x + y‖ ^ 2 := rfl
      _ = ‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2 + 2 * ⟪x, y⟫ := by
        rw [norm_add_sq_real]
        <;> simp [real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq, add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> simp_all [real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> linarith
  
  have h2 : ‖x - y‖^2 = ‖x‖^2 + ‖y‖^2 - 2 * ⟪x, y⟫ := by
    calc
      ‖x - y‖ ^ 2 = ‖x - y‖ ^ 2 := rfl
      _ = ‖x‖ ^ 2 + ‖y‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪x, y⟫ := by
        rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
        <;> simp [real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq, add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> simp_all [real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> linarith
  
  have h3 : ‖x + y‖^2 + ‖x - y‖^2 = 2*‖x‖^2 + 2*‖y‖^2 := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> linarith
  
  rw [h3]
  <;> simp_all
  <;> linarith

theorem exercise_1_12 (n : ℕ) (f : ℕ → ℂ) : 
  abs (∑ i in finset.range n, f i) ≤ ∑ i in finset.range n, abs (f i) := by 
  have h_main : abs (∑ i in finset.range n, f i) ≤ ∑ i in finset.range n, abs (f i) := by
    
    have h₁ : ∀ (n : ℕ) (f : ℕ → ℂ), abs (∑ i in finset.range n, f i) ≤ ∑ i in finset.range n, abs (f i) := by
      intro n
      induction n with
      | zero =>
        
        simp
      | succ n ih =>
        
        simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ, abs.add_le]
        
        <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith [abs_nonneg (∑ i in Finset.range n, f i)]) <;>
        (try simp_all [abs.add_le, abs_nonneg]) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith) <;>
        (try
          {
            cases' n with n
            <;> simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ, abs.add_le, abs_nonneg]
            <;>
            (try norm_num) <;>
            (try linarith)
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ, abs.add_le, abs_nonneg]
            <;>
            (try norm_num) <;>
            (try linarith)
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            exact by
              
              calc
                abs ((∑ i in Finset.range n, f i) + f n) ≤ abs (∑ i in Finset.range n, f i) + abs (f n) := by
                  exact abs.add_le (∑ i in Finset.range n, f i) (f n)
                _ ≤ ∑ i in Finset.range n, abs (f i) + abs (f n) := by
                  exact add_le_add_right ih _
                _ = ∑ i in Finset.range n.succ, abs (f i) := by
                  simp [Finset.sum_range_succ]
                  <;>
                  ring_nf
                  <;>
                  simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ]
                  <;>
                  linarith
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ, abs.add_le, abs_nonneg]
            <;>
            (try norm_num) <;>
            (try linarith)
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            linarith [abs_nonneg (∑ i in Finset.range n, f i)]
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ, abs.add_le, abs_nonneg]
            <;>
            (try norm_num) <;>
            (try linarith)
          })
    exact h₁ n f
  exact h_main

theorem exercise_1_1b
(x : ℝ)
(y : ℚ)
(h : y ≠ 0)
: ( Irrational x ) → Irrational ( x * y ) := by 
  intro hx
  have h_main : Irrational (x * y) := by
    
    intro h1
    
    have h2 : ∃ (a : ℤ) (b : ℕ), b ≠ 0 ∧ (y : ℝ) = a / b := by
      
      have h3 : ∃ (a : ℤ) (b : ℕ), b ≠ 0 ∧ (y : ℝ) = a / b := by
        
        refine' ⟨y.num, y.den, by simpa [Rat.den_nz] using y.den_nz, _⟩
        
        field_simp [Rat.den_nz]
        <;> simp_all [Rat.num_div_den]
        <;> norm_cast
        <;> field_simp [Rat.den_nz]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_cast
        <;> simp_all [Rat.num_div_den]
        <;> field_simp [Rat.den_nz]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_cast
      exact h3
    obtain ⟨a, b, hb, hy⟩ := h2
    
    have h3 : ∃ (c : ℤ) (d : ℕ), d ≠ 0 ∧ (x * y : ℝ) = c / d := by
      
      refine' ⟨(x * y).num, (x * y).den, by simpa [Rat.den_nz] using (x * y).den_nz, _⟩
      
      field_simp [Rat.den_nz]
      <;> simp_all [Rat.num_div_den]
      <;> norm_cast
      <;> field_simp [Rat.den_nz]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_cast
      <;> simp_all [Rat.num_div_den]
      <;> field_simp [Rat.den_nz]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_cast
    obtain ⟨c, d, hd, hxy⟩ := h3
    
    have h4 : x = (c * b : ℝ) / (a * d : ℝ) := by
      
      have h5 : (x * y : ℝ) = c / d := by simpa using hxy
      have h6 : (y : ℝ) = a / b := by simpa using hy
      calc
        x = (x * y : ℝ) / y := by
          field_simp [hb, Rat.cast_eq_zero, h, sub_eq_zero]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp_all [mul_comm]
          <;> field_simp [hb, Rat.cast_eq_zero, h, sub_eq_zero]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp_all [mul_comm]
        _ = (c / d : ℝ) / (a / b : ℝ) := by rw [h5, h6]
        _ = (c * b : ℝ) / (a * d : ℝ) := by
          field_simp [hb, Rat.cast_eq_zero, h, sub_eq_zero, hd]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp_all [mul_comm]
          <;> field_simp [hb, Rat.cast_eq_zero, h, sub_eq_zero, hd]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp_all [mul_comm]
        _ = (c * b : ℝ) / (a * d : ℝ) := by rfl
    have h5 : ∃ (n : ℤ) (m : ℕ), m ≠ 0 ∧ (x : ℝ) = n / m := by
      refine' ⟨c * b, a * d, by
        
        have h6 : a ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h6
          have h7 : (y : ℝ) = 0 := by
            rw [hy]
            simp [h6, hb]
            <;> field_simp [hb]
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> simp_all
          have h8 : (y : ℚ) = 0 := by
            norm_cast at h7 ⊢
            <;> simp_all
          contradiction
        have h7 : d ≠ 0 := by simpa using hd
        have h8 : a ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h8
          have h9 : (y : ℝ) = 0 := by
            rw [hy]
            simp [h8, hb]
            <;> field_simp [hb]
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> simp_all
          have h10 : (y : ℚ) = 0 := by
            norm_cast at h9 ⊢
            <;> simp_all
          contradiction
        have h9 : a * d ≠ 0 := by
          exact mul_ne_zero h8 h7
        simp_all [Rat.cast_eq_zero]
        <;> aesop
      , _⟩
      
      have h6 : a ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h6
        have h7 : (y : ℝ) = 0 := by
          rw [hy]
          simp [h6, hb]
          <;> field_simp [hb]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp_all
        have h8 : (y : ℚ) = 0 := by
          norm_cast at h7 ⊢
          <;> simp_all
        contradiction
      have h7 : d ≠ 0 := by simpa using hd
      have h8 : a ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h8
        have h9 : (y : ℝ) = 0 := by
          rw [hy]
          simp [h8, hb]
          <;> field_simp [hb]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp_all
        have h10 : (y : ℚ) = 0 := by
          norm_cast at h9 ⊢
          <;> simp_all
        contradiction
      have h9 : a * d ≠ 0 := by
        exact mul_ne_zero h8 h7
      have h10 : (x : ℝ) = (c * b : ℝ) / (a * d : ℝ) := by simpa using h4
      have h11 : (x : ℝ) = (c * b : ℤ) / (a * d : ℕ) := by
        norm_cast at h10 ⊢
        <;> field_simp [h9] at h10 ⊢
        <;> ring_nf at h10 ⊢
        <;> norm_cast at h10 ⊢
        <;> simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv]
        <;> field_simp [h9] at h10 ⊢
        <;> ring_nf at h10 ⊢
        <;> norm_cast at h10 ⊢
        <;> simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv]
        <;> field_simp [h9] at h10 ⊢
        <;> ring_nf at h10 ⊢
        <;> norm_cast at h10 ⊢
        <;> simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv]
      simp_all [Rat.cast_eq_zero]
      <;> aesop
    
    obtain ⟨n, m, hm, hx'⟩ := h5
    have h6 : Irrational x := hx
    have h7 : ¬Irrational x := by
      intro h8
      
      have h9 : ¬Irrational x := by
        intro h10
        
        exact h10 ⟨n, by simp_all [Irrational]⟩
      exact h9 h8
    exact h7 h6
  exact h_main
